name: Lamini
description: Enterprise LLM platform for fine-tuning, inference and deployment that reduces hallucinations up to 95% via Memory Tuning.

seo.title: Lamini — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Lamini: Enterprise LLM platform for fine-tuning, inference and deployment that reduces hallucinations up to 95% via Memory Tuning.

when_to_use: Fine-tuning LLMs on private enterprise data with exact accuracy
Running deterministic model outputs for compliance-critical tasks
Hosting private fine-tuned models on enterprise GPU infrastructure
Eliminating hallucinations with memory-tuned Llama models

pros: Focused on fine-tuning over API tricks
cons: Memory Tuning is proprietary — lock-in risk
Smaller community vs Together or Fireworks
review.verdict: Worth evaluating when hallucination is the actual blocker for your LLM rollout.
review.best_for: Enterprises needing factual grounding on private data via fine-tuning
review.not_for: Teams that can get by with RAG on a managed LLM API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
